ai-factory.notes: Validated against upstream 2.10.0 plus merged PR #90 on the 2.x branch. Because published 2.10.0 installs may predate PR #90, aif-rules-check remains a compatibility fallback while AIFHub also adds the OpenSpec generated-rules injection.

openspec.notes: OpenSpec is used as an optional artifact protocol and CLI validation/archive adapter for v1. OpenSpec skills are not installed by this extension.
